questions.question: Describe the main difference between the nature of traditional software and the nature of web applications. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Traditional software is typically installed on a desktop or laptop, whereas web applications are accessed through a web browser.

questions.question: What is the primary role of a software engineer in the software development process? (5 marks)
questions.hint: A software engineer is responsible for designing, developing, testing, and maintaining software systems.

questions.question: Explain the concept of the software process and its importance in software engineering. (10 marks)
questions.hint: The software process refers to the systematic approach to developing and maintaining software systems. It involves a set of activities, tools, and techniques used to manage and improve the development process.
